title: Bauer Professional Wet & Dry Styler Hot Air Brush 38880
features: ALL IN ONE HAIR BRUSH – This wet & dry hair styling brush combines the power of an electric hair dryer with the style and control of a salon standard brush, giving you full control of how you want your hair to look on a day-to-day basis.

2 HEAT SETTINGS – This styling hair brush features 2 separate heat settings, as well as a cool setting, that will allow you to style your hair in a number of different ways, and will benefit a whole array of different hair types.

360° SWIVEL CORD – This styling brush features a flexible power cord that has the capacity to rotate a full 360°, giving you full control of brushing or straightening your hair in any motion required. The bristles are manufactured from nylon, and are cool to touch.

SAFETY & STORAGE – This wet & dry hair brush has a built-in hanging loop that will allow you to drape the hot brush immediately after use without the fear of heating a flat surface. The brush also features a removable brush head, meaning the cleaning and maintenance of the hair brush is super-simple.

BAUER PROFESSIONAL – Bauer professional is the leading manufacturer of salon quality hair products, as well as beauty and personal care products for both men and women. Browse the whole range at the Bauer Professional page on Amazon today.
description: Product Description TourmaPro Range These innovative hair styling products from Bauer Professional will deliver salon-quality hairstyles from the comfort of your own bathroom, bedroom, or beauty salon. The individual devices allow you to create gorgeous hairstyles to suit your every need. From curling wands to straighteners, to hair dryers, there's something for everyone in the TourmaPro range - no matter your hair length or preferred style. Tag us in pictures of your finished styles on Instagram @bauerprofessional. Previous page Style Your Way Have complete control over your hair with a product to suit every blow dry and styling session. Great Hair Days Achieve salon-style results at home or on the go. Choose Your Styler From curling wands to straighteners and hair dryers, find a product in the range to suit you. Tourmaline Technology Tourmaline generates negative ions to reduce frizz and static, leaving hair smooth and soft. Sleek Design Each product in the range comes in a timeless chic black and gold design. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Warning: To avoid risk of burns, do not touch the hot surface of the hair dryer. Keep away from water and ensure the device is unplugged when not in use to prevent electric shock. Do not obstruct the air intake or outlet to prevent overheating.
